title: More Grass
description: Data pack that increases the amount of grass in your world.
body:
![Screen](https://i.imgur.com/E5Rc1rf.png)
Inspired by Dainzh's More Grass Datapack, which increases the amount of grass in your Minecraft world. It adds grass to almost every biome, except for desert, water, and snowy biomes. This data pack is balanced to allow grass to grow much more, but not on every block.

*`With this data pack, you can enjoy a more lush and vibrant world as grass spreads throughout various biomes, making them look more natural and diverse.`*

*`It designed to strike a balance between enhancing the natural beauty of your world while ensuring that gameplay remains challenging and engaging. So, give your world a natural boost and enjoy a more vibrant and lively Minecraft experience with this data pack.`*
